chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2008 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.8686/2020 2. For hearing of main case 07.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General It is jointly stated that this matter is covered by the Division Bench judgment of this court dated 16.04.2019 passed in CP D 5687 of 2014 and connected matters, therefore, this petition may also be disposed of in the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
